Class AnahataNodeFactory.AnahataMdNode

java.lang.Object
java.beans.FeatureDescriptor
org.openide.nodes.Node
org.openide.nodes.FilterNode
uno.anahata.asi.nb.nodes.AnahataNodeFactory.AnahataMdNode
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.openide.util.HelpCtx.Provider, org.openide.util.Lookup.Provider
Enclosing class:
AnahataNodeFactory
private static class AnahataNodeFactory.AnahataMdNode extends org.openide.nodes.FilterNode
A specialized node for the anahata.md file that uses the Anahata icon.
Author:
anahata
